text.title: ba-strategic-partnership Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ba-strategic-partnership as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: BA team develops strategic thinking skills but organization continues to assign them to tactical project-level work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Organizational structure determines job duties. Without restructuring to create strategic BA roles (strategy analysis, innovation scouting, AI governance) that live outside project delivery, new skills are wasted on old work.

failure-mode.description: BA teams upskill in AI/ML but data quality in the organization is poor, AI projects fail, and BA credibility collapses.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI-enabled BA is only effective when organizational data and processes are mature. Premature AI adoption without data/process clarity guarantees failure and discredits the BA transformation.

failure-mode.description: BA strategic impact is recognized but incentive structures remain project-delivery focused, rewarding quick requirement gathering over value exploration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Incentive misalignment undermines capability. If raises and promotions reward speed-to-requirement-approval, BAs will optimize for that instead of value creation.
